summary: Subtitle component with sliding transitions and elegant layouts for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/subtitle-slide/src/SubtitleSlide.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `SubtitleSlide` and `subtitleSlideDefaultProps`, then register the `SubtitleSlide` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Subtitle Slide Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/subtitle-slide to my project. Preserve the exported SubtitleSlideProps API and register the SubtitleSlide composition with the default props.
